name: Voice AI - Incoming Call Handler
description: Handles incoming voice calls from Vapi, fetches customer data from Sarah DB

flow.name: Receive Webhook from Vapi
flow.description: Receives incoming call event from Vapi

flow.name: Lookup Customer in Sarah DB
flow.description: Get customer context by phone number

flow.name: Return Customer Data to Vapi
flow.description: Send customer data back to Vapi for conversation context

customer_not_found.description: Handle case where customer doesn't exist
customer_not_found.action: Return default/nil customer data to Vapi

api_error.action: Return 200 with empty customer data to allow call to proceed

make_com_import_instructions: 2. Add Webhook module - copy URL to Vapi dashboard
3. Add Parse JSON module to extract phone_number
4. Add HTTP module for GET /context endpoint
5. Add Response module to return data to Vapi
